title: cyclosorus paraphysatus
intro: Cyclosorus paraphysatus, also known as the Chinese leopards fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cyclosorus paraphysatus include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
